name: Nutrien Ltd.
description: Nutrien is the world's largest producer of potash and a major nitrogen and phosphate fertilizer company, formed from the 2018 merger of PotashCorp and Agrium and headquartered in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan. The company controls approximately 20% of global installed potash capacity through its Saskatchewan mining operations and also produces nitrogen and phosphate fertilizers through facilities across North America and beyond. Nutrien is a fully integrated crop nutrient producer and agricultural retail distributor in the production stage.
